Notice Of Motion; Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents (Set Two) And Request For Monetary Sanctions And Costs In The Amount Of $1,560.00 From Defendant Michelle Otero; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Ross Mckissick
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER HESLIN's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents (Set Two) And Request For Monetary Sanctions And Costs In The Amount Of $1,560.00 From Defendant Michelle Otero.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion is granted. Defendant Otero is ordered to provide Code-compliant responses to the requests at issue and produce all responsive documents within twenty-one (21) calendar days of notice of entry of order. Monetary sanctions are awarded in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant Otero and her counsel, jointly and severally, in the amount requested of $1,560. The monetary sanctions shall be due and payable by check delivered to the office of Plaintiff's counsel within twenty-one (21) calendar days of notice of entry of order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and email to the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (525/JPT)
